# Traceability Map (review-pack)

Extends the traceability matrix with **Screen** so reviewers see the full chain and
spot disconnected items. A `.csv` twin is emitted for tooling.

| Requirement | Flow (Fxx) | Screen (Sxx) | Business rule (BR) | Error / State | Story | AC | Test |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <BReq-1> | <F01> | <S01,S02> | <BR1> | <CODE_002 / failed> | <S?/—> | <—> | <T?/—> |

## Orphans (must be flagged, never hidden)
- Requirement with no flow / no screen / no test: <…>
- Flow (Fxx) with no requirement: <…>
- Screen (Sxx) with no flow: <…>
- Error code with no flow/step: <…>

## Coverage
- Requirements with ≥1 flow: <n/N>
- Requirements with ≥1 test: <n/N>  (— if build-ready layer not generated)
- Flows mapped to a requirement: <n/N>
